entry.title: WHT (Withholding Tax) input when create PR (Purchase Requisition) or PO (Purchase Order)
entry.content:
Hi All FI Experts.

If we may know,
currently there is an inquiry from the end-user about the feasibility on setting-up or configuring the automatic calculation of WHT (Withholding Tax) based amount at document line-item level when parking/posting invoice using transaction code MIR7 or MIRO; by firstly having WHT Tax and WHT Code information at PO Item level since PR (Purchase Requisition)/PO (Purchase Order) creation using transaction code ME51N or ME21N.

Would you like to kindly help us on giving advice whether there is any particular technical ABAP coding using BAPI / BAdI, or relevant statement arranged in Validation GGB0, or another way needed for this requirement, please? 

Thank you so much, and we are looking forward to discussing this with you.

Ani.

 

cc @raghavendra_praveen @Priya2310 @Divyesh_Mistry  @former_member682878  @former_member183424  @JL23  @s_raghavan @former_member466170 @akshyadhingra @anss_shahid 

MM (Materials Management) FIN (Finance) MM Purchasing MM Invoice Verification SAP Invoice and Goods Receipt Reconciliation  SAP S/4HANA Finance FIN Posting and Taxes

entry.title: GR Cancellation/reversal issue: "Deficit of PU GR quantity xxxx DAY"
entry.content:
Hi,

When I tried to post a goods cancellation reversal (102 or 122 Movement Type), I got the error 'Deficit of PU IR quantity xxxx DAY'.

My scenario is as follows: 

Our PO has one line; we don't have stock to manage, and we have the total invoiced amount greater than the received amount. And we want to post a GR cancellation to adjust the balance. As we have the flag GR-Bsd Inv already checked, we forced the system using the transactions (OMJJ & OMBZ). We managed to bypass the control, and we reverted two lines. But the system is blocking the reversal of a new line with the new amount.

We tried with different movement type but the error message is the same: 102 & 122. 

My question is why is it not allowing me to post the goods reversal? and how to overcome this issue?

Thanks a lot for your insights and support.

MM (Materials Management)

entry.title: Validation of Standard SAP TRM Interest Calculation vs. Daily Compounding
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have some question regarding interest calculation in TRM and would appreciate your insight. 

We are validating interest calculation behavior in SAP S/4HANA TRM (Interest Rate Instruments).

Observed behavior:

  • SAP calculates interest only on the contractual principal.
  • Prior‑day accrued interest is not included in the interest calculation base unless there is an explicit principal increase / capitalization event.
  • This results in linear accrual, not true daily compounding.

Comparison:

SAP: Principal × Daily Rate × (n/360)
Lender: (Principal + Prior‑Day Accrued Interest) × Daily Rate × (n/360)

Questions:

  1. Is it correct that standard SAP TRM has no configuration option (IRI / interest calc method / condition setup) to automatically include prior‑day accrued interest in the interest base?
  2. Is SAP’s design intent to exclude accrued interest from the base for valuation and accounting consistency?
  3. When lender invoices use daily compounding, is the recommended best practice to post the variance as a P&L adjustment at settlement, rather than altering daily accruals?
  4. Would true daily capitalization require custom development or manual principal adjustments (and is that generally discouraged)?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to enable rule valuation group code for transaction FR3 via OBYC
entry.content:
Hi expert,

Do you know the reason that the setting doesn't work for the plant which don't have a specific valuation modification?

entry.title: ZUGFERD vs XRECHNUNG-B2B Customer Invoices from External System
entry.content:
Hi,

In Germany, we can exchange B2B invoices with customers in two ways.

1. via PEPPOL Network (supported via XRECHNUNG profile supported via UBL 2.1)

2. via Email (supported via ZUGFERD supported by CII)

We may have customers who wants invoice in PDF embedded with XML and other may want Invoice to be send over Peppol as pure XML XRechnung invoice. For our client 99 percent of customer invoices are generated in a non-SAP systems.

Now for a customer who opts for Peppol exchange and an invoice is created in external system and the middleware transform it to UBL 2.1 format invoice to be consumed in SAP DRC and SAP DRC creates an eDocument for it so that it can be send over Peppol to the customer, this invoice exchange happens using pure XML Rechnung profile supported by UBL 2.1 format.

Question: For a customer who wishes to have invoice via email method ,PDF (embedded with XML) ZUGFERD profile , will the middleware have to transform the invoice from non-SAP system to CII format rather than UBL 2.1 and then send it to SAP DRC to create an eDocument and then send it to the customer via eDoc_cockpit OR SAP DRC will use UBL 2.1 format to generate an XML which will be consumed by SAP DRC and then SAP convert into a format which is compatible with ZUGFERD (CII) so that it can be send over to customer via Email.

entry.title: Opening and Closing Bank Balance per Period in Indirect Cash Flow Statement
entry.content:
Hello,

We are configuring the Indirect Cash Flow Statement using a Financial Reporting Structure in SAP Business ByDesign.

The report is accessed via:

General Ledger Work Center  > Reports > Financial Statements > Select Reporting Structure (Cash Flow).

The Indirect Cash Flow Statement is created via:

Business Configuration > Overview > Financial Reporting Structures for Cost Center Management Accounting Reports >  Copy from Template > Select GB - Cash Flow Statement (Ind. Method)

Our requirement is to show the following per period within the Cash Flow statement:

  • Opening bank balance

  • Closing bank balance

  • Movement (difference between opening and closing)

Example layout:


PeriodOpening BalanceMovementClosing Balance
JanXYX + Y
FebClosing JanZClosing Jan + Z

Is it possible in SAP Business ByDesign Financial Reporting Structure / Financial Statements report to display:

  1. Opening balance per period

  2. Closing balance per period

directly within the Cash Flow statement Report?

Any guidance or recommended approach would be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Related to exam (SAP Certified - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, Financial Accounting)
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have my SAP certification exam in 2 days and wanted to ask those who have recently taken the exam about the new certification exam format.

How was your experience with the new format? Are the questions mostly scenario-based, and is it manageable for beginners who have mainly practiced configuration and basic concepts?

Any last-minute preparation tips to clear the exam on the first attempt would be really helpful.

Thank you in advance!

#SAP #SAPCertification #SAPFICO #SAPLearning #SAPHANA #SAPCommunity #FinanceTransformation #SAPConsultant #S4HANA

entry.title: PO created via BAPI_PO_CREATE1 cannot be used for GR in MIGO, but ME21N PO works
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am having an issue with purchase orders created using BAPI_PO_CREATE1.

If I create a PO manually with ME21N, I can post a goods receipt in MIGO without any issues. However, if I create a PO using BAPI_PO_CREATE1, I get the following error in MIGO when trying to post GR:

“Document 450000XXXX does not contain any selectable items.”

I compared a PO created via ME21N and one created via the BAPI. Header and item data such as material, plant, quantity, etc. are the same, and the BAPI-created PO is not blocked, not delivery completed, and fully released.

One clear difference I noticed is that the PO created via ME21N has a Conditions tab with pricing conditions maintained, while the PO created via BAPI_PO_CREATE1 does not have the Conditions tab at all.

I tried populating POCOND and POCONDHEADER (as well as the corresponding X structures) when calling the BAPI, but this did not change the result. The Conditions tab is still missing, and the PO items are still not selectable in MIGO.

My questions are:

  • Can missing or incomplete pricing/conditions cause PO items to be non‑selectable for goods receipt in MIGO?
  • Is there anything specific that needs to be populated in BAPI_PO_CREATE1 to ensure pricing is finalized in the same way as ME21N?
  • Are there any commonly missed mandatory fields or flags related to pricing (for example NET_PRICE, PRICE_UNIT, CHANGE_ID, etc.) when creating POs via the BAPI?

Any advice or pointers would be appreciated. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: F110 vendor invoice Special GL indicator not considred in proposal
entry.content:
Hello experts,

In my ECC system, user has posted a vendor invoice with Special G/L indicator 'M' that comes from incomming interface. This invoice is never considred by F110 payment proposal. 

When I post manuelly the same invoice without the Special G/L indicator, the invoice is considred..

Any idea why do we have the different behaviours ? 

The Special G/L indicator seems to be correctly set :

When I try to post the invoice mannualy,  I don't even can enter payment data because  fields don't appear.

I checked group field status and dosn't seem the difference is comming from there.

Regards,

Thank you!

entry.title: Austria - Has anyone configured the Payment medium pain.001.001.09 XML
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently configuring the new payment medium pain.001.001.09 for European countries, specifically for Austria.
While generating the payment file, we are receiving an error during the creation of the XML output.

We contacted the bank and requested a sample/test XML file, but they only provided us with a Master File. We have configured the DMEE and payment medium settings according to the Master File, but the error still occurs.

Has anyone successfully configured pain.001.001.09 for Austria?
If possible, could you please share a Test XML file (anonymized) so we can validate our mapping?

 

Thanks

Nag

entry.title: Export Software Collection/Export Customizing Transport
entry.content: I Made a change in Custom Fields, after making the change I published. I was not prompted for a transport and I cant not see my change in Export software collection. How to resolve this so that I can move the change from Dev to Test.

entry.title: El ejercicio 2026 no se habilito para los activos fijos modifique el ejercicio
entry.content:
Buen día se solicita de su apoyo para solucionar el error de El ejercicio 2026 no se habilito para los activos fijos modifique el ejercicio. Ya se hizo el traspaso de ejercicio en modificar ejercicio de 2025 a 2026, ya se realizó el periodo contable. la versión es SAP B1 HANA 10.0 FP 2405
Agradezco si alguien le ha pasado este error, para ver cómo puedo solucionarlo.

entry.title: Is transaction S_ALR_87005540 a reporting tcode?
entry.content: I have to create a role for tcode S_ALR_87005540. I asked my colleague to if this is a reporting tcode and he said yes it is however, chatgpt and copilot is saying it is not a reporting tcode.

entry.title: Report RFBILA10 - Button "Data Sources for G/LAccount Balances" not working
entry.content:
Hello together,

we implemented archiving in our system via SAP DART/ILM. Now testing all applications on ACC System to make sure the reports can access the archived data. For Report RFBILA10 thats not the case.  Anyone else faced this problem? Thanks in advance for any hint/idea!

See the following for all details and things i already tryed.

System Infos

  • S4HANA ON PREMISE 2023 SP 02
  • Business Function "FIN_GL_CI_3" is activated

The Problem

The Button "Data Sources for G/LAccount Balances" not working in Report RFBILA10.

RFBILA10 bases on the logical database SDF, so the button functionality is programmed in report SAPDBSDF. This functionality is also called when using report RFBILA00 - there it works. The Problem in RFBILA10 is the if case in line 971.
As its complete standard and the variable get_events is not filled in the programm itself but earlier in some runtime generated programs im unable to find out on which condition it is set (to figure out customizing table or...)

What i tryed

  • Debugging to find out the root cause
    • things sadly to deep cause logical database technology
  • Debugging and change parameters so the button works
    • Didn't solved the problem - archiv data was not requested - but in the dialog you could see the archiv runs and select them
  • Playing around with ASDATASRC1 - Was not helping at all
    • https://me.sap.com/notes/596865
  • Check our archive settings (SARA/SARJ/SARI)
    • Checked the structure of the logical database SDF and looked up the corresponding archiv objects (FI_ACCOUNT, FI_DOCUMNT, FI_DOC_PPA,FI_TF_GLF) - via SARA i could see that the archvied data is correctly stored there

entry.title: Issue while posting vendor invoice using FB60
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am new to SAP and currently working in the FI module. I am trying to post a vendor invoice using transaction FB60, but I am facing an issue.

System Details:
- SAP Version: S/4HANA
- Module: FI (Accounts Payable)

Steps I followed:
1. Entered company code
2. Entered vendor details
3. Added invoice amount and tax
4. Tried to post the document

Issue / Error:
balancing field "profit center" in line item 001 not filed

What I have checked so far:
- Verified vendor master data
- Checked GL account settings

Expected Outcome:
The invoice should post successfully without errors.

Could someone please guide me on what might be missing or incorrectly configured?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Accounting document not offsettable with CME 1
entry.content:
I'm currently facing a situation regarding postings with CME 1 for clients.

In our case, we've been using CME 1 to post deposits received from our clients (posted to account 1800000 as a CME reconciliation account, leaving the entry open in the client's account as a special ledger entry).

Now, our client wants to offset a deposit with an invoice. When they go to the "Offset Payments Received" application, the option to offset these items is not available. Is there a configuration setting to modify this?

 

Additionally, and what is most striking, if I go to the "automatic payment management" app it does allow me to access these items, since I have configuration point 101293 with CME 1

I cannot use the automatic payment management app because I have to apply the difference between the deposit and the invoice to the customer's account and leave it pending. Its the reason

Is this about the special ledger transaction type? Does it mean that all entries that are "Z" cannot be offset?

Thank for your help!!

entry.title: Intangible assets
entry.content: How to set Intangible assets in the Fixed asset master data ,as Items or Itemised Services

entry.title: Revaluation of Fixed Asset – Posting in a Separate Document
entry.content:
Currently, the revaluation of assets is posted in the AFAB document during the depreciation run, and the amounts are compressed based on the GL accounts.

Would it be possible to post the revaluation of fixed assets in a separate document and for each asset individually? Can this be customized? This is a legal requirement in Turkey for tax regulations.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Revert Fiscal Year Variant (SZ) from Calendar Year to Year-Dependent
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Good day.

I am currently configuring the Fiscal Year Variant in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using the standard variant SZ (Configurable Template Variant). I would like to maintain a year-dependent fiscal year variant.

Initially, I was able to successfully set up the SZ variant as year-dependent and define the custom fiscal year variant accordingly. However, during testing, I changed the setting to Calendar Year (by selecting the relevant checkbox).

After making this change, I am now unable to revert the configuration back to year-dependent. When attempting to do so, I encounter the following error message:

  • "Deletion not possible for record created by SAP Message no. /CFG/CF_SSC_FRW123"

Actually, my intention was not to delete any SAP pre-delivered configuration. Also, the system currently does not contain any journal entries or postings. Based on my understanding, it should still be possible to adjust the fiscal year variant at this stage.

May I kindly seek further advice on whether there is any recommended approach to revert the configuration back to year-dependent?

Thank you very much in advance for your support.

Best regards, 

HY
